settings.heading: Move freely, on every surface.
settings.subtitle: AquaStep water shoes are engineered with lightweight knit, quick-drain soles, and grip-anywhere rubber — built for the beach, the boat, and the trail.

settings.heading: Quick-Dry Knit
settings.text: Drains and dries in minutes — no more soggy steps.

settings.heading: Barefoot Feel
settings.text: Ultra-lightweight design moves with you, not against you.

settings.heading: Anti-Slip Sole
settings.text: Reinforced rubber grip for wet rocks, decks, and sand.

settings.heading: Reef Protected
settings.text: Tough outer shields your feet from sharp surfaces.

settings.heading: Why athletes choose AquaStep
settings.subtitle: Tested in surf, sand, river, and reef. Every detail is designed to keep you moving.

settings.heading: Made for the water, ready for everything
settings.subtitle: Our most-loved styles, engineered with quick-dry fabric and anti-slip soles.

settings.heading: Designed by surfers. Tested by everyone.
settings.text: Every pair of AquaStep shoes starts with a single goal: feel like you are barefoot, but with protection. We obsess over every gram, every drainage hole, every grip pattern — so you don't have to think about your feet.
Best water shoes I've ever owned. They're light, they drain instantly, and the grip on wet rocks is unreal. I wear them paddleboarding every weekend.
settings.name: Sarah K.

settings.text: I bought these for a family trip to Hawaii. Three of us wore them daily on lava rock, sand, and in the surf. Zero blisters, zero slipping.
settings.name: Marcus T.

settings.text: They look way cooler than I expected. I wear them around town too — people always ask where I got them. The teal color is gorgeous.
settings.name: Emma R.

settings.heading: Get 10% off your first order
settings.text: Subscribe for early access to new colors, exclusive drops, and adventure stories from our crew.
